title: Why does AI still forget what your codebase is "for"?
abstract: Sometimes, your code feels like a mystery—surely you wrote it to "save the world" (actually just a simple todo app)—but why can't AI remember that? Fear not; "Why does AI still forget what your codebase is for?" is here to help. With this tool, your code won't be lost in the weeds and will find its purpose again. Join us in uncovering the truth!
abstract_zh: 有时候代码就像一道谜题，你明明记得写这个项目是为了“拯救世界”（其实是做个简单的待办事项应用），但AI怎么就忘得一干二净了？别担心，“Why does AI still forget what your codebase is for?” 就是来帮你的！用它，让你的代码不再迷茫，找回初心。快来一起解密吧！
